assertion_results.text: JQL queries use the project key (TC) and vulnerability issue type ID (10024) from the Security Configuration in claude-md-security-config.md — not hardcoded values (§1.49)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md explicitly states '**Project:** TC' and '**Vulnerability issue type ID:** 10024' at the top. All three JQL queries use 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024', matching the Security Configuration values.

assertion_results.text: Three separate queries are constructed: one for untriaged issues (labels NOT IN ai-cve-triaged), one for triaged-but-new issues (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status = New), and one for Ready for QA candidates (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status NOT IN Closed, Verified, ON_QA) (§1.48)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md contains three separate JQL queries: (1) 'labels NOT IN (ai-cve-triaged)' under '## 1. Untriaged Issues', (2) 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status = New' under '## 2. Triaged but still New', (3) 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, \'ON_QA\')' under '## 3. Ready for QA'.

assertion_results.text: Results are grouped into three clearly separated lists: Untriaged issues, Triaged but still New issues, and Ready for QA issues
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md has three clearly separated sections with headers: '## 1. Untriaged Issues' (4 issues), '## 2. Triaged but still New' (1 issue), and '## 3. Ready for QA' (3 candidates, split into Qualified and Excluded sub-sections).

assertion_results.text: Each listed issue shows: issue key, status, CVE ID (from labels), summary, and created date
assertion_results.evidence: All issues show the required fields. Untriaged issues table columns: '# | Issue | CVE | Summary | Created' with status conveyed via grouping headers ('### Status: In Progress', '### Status: New'). Triaged-but-new table: '# | Issue | Status | CVE | Summary | Created'. Ready for QA tables: 'Issue | Status | CVE | Summary | Created | Remediation Tasks'. All five data points (key, status, CVE, summary, created) are present for every issue.

assertion_results.text: Status-aware handling: New issues (TC-9001, TC-9002, TC-9004) are presented for full triage, while the In Progress issue (TC-9003) triggers a warning about active work
assertion_results.evidence: status-handling.md shows: TC-9001 (New): 'Proceed with full triage (default path). No warnings required.'; TC-9002 (New): same; TC-9004 (New): same. TC-9003 (In Progress): 'Warn the user before proceeding.' with message '"This issue is already in `In Progress`. It may be actively worked on."' and options to proceed or skip.

assertion_results.text: Ready for QA filtering: TC-9020 appears in Ready for QA (all linked Tasks Done/Closed), TC-9023 is excluded (TC-9025 still In Progress), TC-9026 is excluded (no Depend links)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md shows TC-9020 under '### Qualified -- Ready for QA' with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. Under '### Excluded': TC-9023 with reason 'TC-9025 still In Progress -- remediation not complete', and TC-9026 with reason 'No linked Tasks with type "Depend" -- no remediation to verify'.
